scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix name "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix name "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix name "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
